# terrible_cisco_meraki_devices_switch_routing_interfaces_dhcp (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `bootFileName` (String) The PXE boot server filename for the DHCP server running on the switch interface.
- `bootNextServer` (String) The PXE boot server IP for the DHCP server running on the switch interface.
- `bootOptionsEnabled` (Boolean) Enable DHCP boot options to provide PXE boot options configs for the dhcp server running on the switch interface.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `dhcpLeaseTime` (String) The DHCP lease time config for the dhcp server running on switch interface ('30 minutes', '1 hour', '4 hours', '12 hours', '1 day' or '1 week').
- `dhcpMode` (String) The DHCP mode options for the switch interface ('dhcpDisabled', 'dhcpRelay' or 'dhcpServer').
- `dhcpOptions` (String) Array of DHCP options consisting of code, type and value for the DHCP server running on the switch interface.
- `dhcpRelayServerIps` (String) The DHCP relay server IPs to which DHCP packets would get relayed for the switch interface.
- `dnsCustomNameservers` (String) The DHCP name server IPs when DHCP name server option is 'custom'.
- `dnsNameserversOption` (String) The DHCP name server option for the dhcp server running on the switch interface ('googlePublicDns', 'openDns' or 'custom').
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `fixedIpAssignments` (String) Array of DHCP fixed IP assignments for the DHCP server running on the switch interface.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `interfaceId` (String) InterfaceId path parameter. Interface ID.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `reservedIpRanges` (String) Array of DHCP reserved IP assignments for the DHCP server running on the switch interface.
- `serial` (String) Serial path parameter.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `meraki_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco Meraki Python SDK
